programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ferengi and Enterprise teams beam down to an unknown world to discover who or what has sapped power from both vessels.

programme.desc: The librarians are forced to intercede when a group of competitive high school students start undercutting each other with witchcraft.
